failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation due to solvent crystallization at lower temperatures
failure_modes.mitigation: Maintain system temperature above solvent crystallization point

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction product at high concentrations
failure_modes.mitigation: Dilute feed concentration or increase flow rate to reduce residence time

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve operation at varying temperatures to ensure no blockage occurs
Conduct flow tests with varying concentrations to assess risk of reactor tube clogging
